entities.name: DIGITAL SOIL MAPPING
entities.description: A technique used to help smallholder farmers secure soil and food security in developing regions

entities.name: SOIL SECURITY
entities.description: The objective of ensuring sustainable and healthy soil for agricultural productivity

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The objective of ensuring consistent access to sufficient and nutritious food

entities.name: DEVELOPING REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas where digital soil mapping is implemented to support smallholder farmers

entities.name: SPATIAL DOWNSCALING
entities.description: A method to disaggregate coarse spatial resolution soil information into fine spatial resolution maps

entities.name: SOIL EXCHANGEABLE POTASSIUM
entities.description: A soil property (Kex) that was disaggregated from coarse to fine spatial resolution maps

entities.name: SOIL TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: A soil property (TN) that was disaggregated from coarse to fine spatial resolution maps

entities.name: WEIGHTED GENERALIZED ADDITIVE MODELS
entities.description: Statistical models (GAMs) used to perform the spatial downscaling of soil maps

entities.name: SOUTH INDIA
entities.description: The location of the smallholder villages where the soil downscaling research was conducted

entities.name: SPECTRAL INDICES
entities.description: Fine spatial resolution data incorporated into the downscaling process to enhance spatial details

entities.name: SOIL PREDICTION MAPS
entities.description: Maps used to predict soil properties, which can be developed at regional scales and downscaled to farm scales

relationships.description: is the location where models were applied
